summary: Beta-Readiness QA pass on Cyber-Casino Chess: Voice Coach, Roguelite Chess Trial, Battle Mode skin. Backend 10/10 PASS (move-tip, voice-question guards 400/413/422-or-502, state auth gate 401, start idempotent, full scoring math + lives-to-zero + 409-on-ended-trial, leaderboard min/max clamping). Regression Shield 201/201 PASS. Frontend E2E confirmed all three features render and integrate correctly on /practice/play/chess after demo login.
critical_code_review_comments: Roguelite leaderboard does an N+1 user lookup per row inside a loop (routes/roguelite_chess.py L246-253). At 50 rows this is 50 sequential mongo round-trips. Recommend batching with $in or aggregation $lookup for production scale.
Voice coach voice-question creates a fresh OpenAISpeechToText + LlmChat client per request. Acceptable for sporadic use but consider pooling if traffic grows.

roguelite_chess.py uses module-level Mongo client init at import time (L58); this is fine but if MONGO_URL is missing the module silently sets _db=None and every call returns 503 — could be louder in startup logs.
test_credentials: betatester1@globalvibez.com / BetaTester2026! (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Note: review_request listed password as 'BetaTester_2026!' with underscore — that is INCORRECT; canonical is BetaTester2026! (no underscore). Demo Login (Quick Access) button works and was used for frontend E2E.
seed_data_creation: Test wiped and re-seeded the demo user's roguelite_chess_trials doc for today's day_key to validate scoring math deterministically. The demo guest's trial was reset 3→0 lives during testing; a new trial will auto-start on next call, but if the demo account is shared the lives may be 0 until UTC midnight.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three Cyber-Casino chess features (Voice Coach, Roguelite Trial, Battle Mode) are FULLY VERIFIED on prod URL. Frontend testids confirmed: voice-coach-trigger, voice-coach-panel, voice-coach-mic-btn, roguelite-trial-badge, roguelite-lives, roguelite-score, chess-view-classic, chess-view-battle. Backend regression baseline at 201/201. Safe to open beta.

verified_features.voice_coach_move_tip: POST /api/voice-coach/move-tip — verified 200 with valid coaching tip text on starting position FEN and midgame FEN (Claude Sonnet 4.5 live).
verified_features.voice_coach_voice_question_guards: Empty audio → 400, >25MB → 413, garbage audio → 502 (Whisper rejected upstream — acceptable per spec which allows 422/400/502).
verified_features.roguelite_state_auth_gate: GET /api/roguelite-chess/state returns 403 unauth, 200 with bearer token.
verified_features.roguelite_start_idempotent: POST /api/roguelite-chess/start returns 200 with full TrialState shape (day_key, lives, score, streak, started_at, ends_at, is_alive).
verified_features.roguelite_scoring_math: win+elo_diff=50 → +150 score, draw → +25 score & streak reset to 0, 3 consecutive losses → lives 3→2→1→0, is_alive=false.
verified_features.roguelite_409_on_ended_trial: After lives==0, both subsequent loss and subsequent win record-result calls return 409 'Trial already ended for today' as required.
verified_features.roguelite_leaderboard_clamping: limit=500 capped at 200 rows, limit=0 clamped to min 1.
verified_features.frontend_practice_chess_page: All three features render: Roguelite Trial Badge in header (3 hearts, score 0, 21h 34m countdown), Voice Coach Cyber-Casino panel opens on voice-coach-trigger click with 'Sharp eyes on the board' headline + press-and-hold mic, Battle Mode toggle (CLASSIC ↔ NEON ARENA) renders 64-square chessboard correctly in both views.
verified_features.regression_shield_baseline: 201/201 PASS — supreme regression baseline preserved. NO test was modified.
